generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on motor for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M) data from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position angle data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position angle data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque values for motor and gearwheel"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model for robot joint"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model for robot joint"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model for robot joint"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model for robot joint"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction model simulation and identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset management of robot components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for monitoring robot performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box models with integrated dashboard visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionOptimizationInsight
]

instance FrictionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for optimizing robot control parameters based on identified friction models to enhance motion accuracy and reduce inaccuracies up to 30%"
]

instance RobotFirstAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox; maximum working range [-90°, 90°], maximum speed 75°/s"
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    base:contains RobotFirstAxisComponent, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT; specific time scale not detailed in document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models, live sensor data via MQTT, Asset Administration Shell for asset management, and dashboard visualization to form a passive digital shadow for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, using live operational data for continuous model improvement during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated vs measured data; models account for load, temperature, and time dependencies; uncertainties in friction parameters from analytical and data-driven approaches."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) standards applied for system modeling and asset representation"
]
